mieutangan: Conducting projects, tasks, initiatives, and scientific programs in the field of social resource development.

Consulting, applying, and transferring scientific and technological research results; Organizing scientific conferences and workshops; Communicating and disseminating scientific knowledge; Organizing training courses, workshops, and professional training for agencies, organizations, enterprises, and individuals in need; Printing and publishing related documents
Cooperating with agencies, organizations, businesses, and individuals domestically and internationally to fulfill the Institute's functions and tasks in accordance with legal regulations

Australia, officially known as the Commonwealth of Australia, is a vast and diverse country in the Southern Hemisphere, comprising the mainland, the island of Tasmania, and numerous smaller islands. Renowned for its stunning natural landscapes, high quality of life, and open society, Australia has become one of the top destinations for international students.
mieutachitiet:
With a globally recognized education system, attractive career opportunities, and a strong commitment to sustainable development, Australia offers more than just a degree – it provides a life-changing experience.

Western Australia. (Photo: Collected)

1. World-class education system

Australia’s education system is among the best in the world, home to many prestigious universities such as University of Melbourne, Australian National University, University of Sydney, and Southern Cross University.

  • Diverse programs: From engineering, IT, business, and healthcare to the arts, students can choose from thousands of courses that meet global demands.
  • High teaching standards: Governed by the Education Services for Overseas Students (ESOS) Act, ensuring quality and safety for international students.
  • Practical learning: Focused on hands-on experience, critical thinking, and real-world applications.
  • Student support: Includes orientation programs, English language courses, and career counseling.

Global education system.

2. A multicultural and open society

Over 30% of Australia’s population was born overseas, making it one of the most multicultural nations in the world. This diversity enriches daily life and fosters an environment of tolerance, respect, and understanding.

  • Active lifestyle: Australians value a balance between work, leisure, and community.
  • Cultural festivals: Events such as the Sydney Festival, Melbourne International Arts Festival, and NAIDOC Week… celebrate creativity and native heritage.
  • Global cuisine: Reflecting the richness of migrant communities.

Australia’s festivals, nature, and cuisine. (Photo: Collected)

3. The beautiful environment and sustainable development

Australia is home to natural wonders such as the Great Barrier Reef, Uluru, and the Daintree Rainforest. Its climate ranges from tropical and desert to temperate, offering diverse experiences for both residents and visitors.

  • Environmental protection: Strict conservation laws safeguard wildlife and ecosystems.
  • Renewable energy leadership: Strong investments in solar and wind power help reduce emissions.
  • Outdoor lifestyle: Surfing, hiking, and camping are part of everyday life.

4. The strong economy and career opportunities

Australia’s economy is stable, diverse, and strong in key sectors such as mining, agriculture, technology, education, and tourism.

  • Part-time work while studying: International students can work part-time to gain experience and support their finances.
  • Post-graduation pathway: The Temporary Graduate Visa (subclass 485) allows graduates to stay and work, opening opportunities toward permanent residency.
  • Fair working environment: Labor laws ensure fair wages and employee rights.

Perth City, Western Australia. (Photo: Travelsewhere)

5. Why choose Australia for studying abroad?

Australia stands out for its unique combination of:

  • High-quality education recognized worldwide
  • Safe and welcoming communities for international students
  • Career opportunities across diverse industries
  • Spectacular natural landscapes and a sustainable lifestyle

For those seeking academic excellence, cultural richness, and career growth, Australia is not just a study destination – it is a place to grow, connect, and succeed.

mieutangan: Australia is well known for its advanced and globally recognized education system. Through the Australian Qualifications Framework (AQF), which includes 10 levels from vocational certificates to doctoral degrees, learners can pursue flexible pathways tailored to their goals.
mieutachitiet:
1. Qualifications and Study Pathways

  • School Education (Primary & Secondary): Compulsory from ages 6 to 16. Schools focus on independent thinking, life skills, and academic English foundations.
  • Vocational Education & Training (VET): Offers Certificates I–IV, Diplomas, and Advanced Diplomas. These courses emphasize hands-on learning and prepare students for the workforce.
  • Higher Education: Includes Bachelor’s, Master’s, and Doctoral degrees. Shorter programs such as Graduate Certificates and Diplomas provide specialized knowledge.

2. Pathways and International Recognition

With AQF, students can easily progress from vocational studies to university or from undergraduate to postgraduate programs. Australian qualifications are widely recognized in the US, UK, Canada, Europe, and beyond. Over 90% of international graduates secure employment within six months, both in Australia and worldwide.

3. Key Features

  • Flexibility: Multiple pathways designed for diverse personal and career goals.
  • Practical focus: Programs closely linked to industry and real-world application.
  • Global recognition: Qualifications valued internationally, enhancing career prospects.
  • Multicultural environment: A dynamic study setting with students from across the globe.
tukhoa: education, education in Australia, study abroad, Leading Edge Migration, Phuong Nam Institute

tieude: INTRODUCING LEADING UNIVERSITIES AND POPULAR STUDY FIELDS IN AUSTRALIA
mieutangan: Australia has long been recognized as an ideal destination for international students, offering world-class education, globally recognized qualifications, and abundant career opportunities. Beyond its modern learning environment, Australian universities and institutes stand out for their practical engagement, diverse study options, and comprehensive support policies for international students.
mieutachitiet:
Australia has long been recognized as an ideal destination for international students, offering world-class education, globally recognized qualifications, and abundant career opportunities. Beyond its modern learning environment, Australian universities and institutes stand out for their practical engagement, diverse study options, and comprehensive support policies for international students.

Southern Cross University – A leading public university in Australia, where global careers begin

Southern Cross University (SCU) is one of Australia’s prestigious universities, officially established as a university in 1994. The university boasts modern campuses that provide an ideal learning environment—dynamic yet close to nature.

SCU’s strength lies in its strong community engagement strategy, combining teaching with practical research. The university is well-regarded for its high-demand disciplines with strong migration prospects, such as Civil Engineering, Environmental Science, Information Technology, Tourism & Hospitality, Nursing, Health Sciences, and Zoology.

International tuition fees for 2024 range from AUD 24,000 to 36,000 per year, depending on the program. With outstanding teaching quality, SCU was ranked among the Top 100 Young Universities worldwide (Times Higher Education, 2019). It is an ideal destination for international students seeking a valuable degree, global career opportunities, and a memorable study and life experience in Australia.

Sheridan Institute of Higher Education – A solid stepping stone to a global future

Sheridan Institute of Higher Education is a leading non-profit private university in Australia, located in the heart of Perth—one of the world’s most livable cities. Established by Australian Baptist Education Inc and fully accredited by TEQSA, Sheridan is committed to delivering an international, student-centered learning experience.

What makes Sheridan unique is its mission of education grounded in humanistic and Christian values, encouraging students to pursue truth, wisdom, and creativity, and to become leaders who foster peace and innovation.

The university offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in Business and Education, with practical teaching methods and small class sizes that ensure each student receives maximum support. Studying at Sheridan is not just about earning a degree—it is about experiencing life in a dynamic international community and unlocking wide-ranging career opportunities in Australia and worldwide. It is an ideal choice for international students seeking quality education, affordable costs, and a sustainable future.

AIBI Higher Education – A gateway to a global career in the digital age

AIBI Higher Education (AIBI HE) is a modern and innovative higher education provider in Australia, fully accredited by TEQSA. AIBI HE focuses on rapidly growing fields in the digital transformation era, equipping students with practical knowledge and skills to compete successfully in the global workforce.

What sets AIBI HE apart is its small class sizes, personalized learning programs, and experienced teaching staff, ensuring every student receives individual attention and maximum support. Key study areas include Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence, Digital Business, and Management—disciplines that meet the demand for highly skilled professionals in the Industry 4.0 era.

AIBI HE also offers generous scholarships and tuition discounts, giving international students access to high-quality education at an affordable cost. Choosing AIBI HE means studying in a modern environment, developing specialized skills, and opening doors to career opportunities in Australia and across the world.

National Institute of Technology (NIT) Australia – The smart pathway to an international degree at optimal cost

The National Institute of Technology (NIT) Australia is a modern education provider tailored for international students seeking affordable pathways to globally recognized qualifications. With its flexible training model, students can complete a Diploma at NIT and then transfer to partner universities to obtain a Bachelor’s degree, opening up extensive study and career opportunities.

NIT’s strength lies in its practical, career-oriented training, focusing on the skills employers value most. Students are equipped to be “job-ready upon graduation,” with standout programs in Business Management, Information Technology, and Project Management. Tuition fees at NIT are highly competitive.

Choosing NIT means embarking on a smart study-abroad journey in Australia—cost-effective, fully supported, and rich with opportunities for employment and migration in one of the world’s leading economies.

With its diverse education system—from prestigious universities to high-quality institutes—Australia offers international students a wide range of options tailored to their needs and career goals. More than just a study destination, Australia is a gateway to a sustainable future and a successful international career for the next generation.

tieude: LEADING EDGE MIGRATION (LEM) VISA CONSULTING SERVICE – THE GOLDEN KEY TO ACHIEVING YOUR AUSTRALIAN DREAM
mieutangan: Are you nurturing a dream of studying, working, or settling in Australia but worried about applications, procedures, and visa approval rates? Based in Perth, Australia, Leading Edge Migration (LEM) is your trusted companion, providing comprehensive visa consulting services to help you confidently unlock the gateway to the Land of Kangaroos.
mieutachitiet:
Are you nurturing a dream of studying, working, or settling in Australia but worried about applications, procedures, and visa approval rates? Based in Perth, Australia, Leading Edge Migration (LEM) is your trusted companion, providing comprehensive visa consulting services to help you confidently unlock the gateway to the Land of Kangaroos.

With years of experience and an outstanding success rate, LEM is proud to be a pioneer in offering all-in-one education and migration consulting services, supporting students and families in making their dream of a new horizon come true. LEM has developed an internationally standardized process, guiding clients step by step:

  • In-depth career and migration counseling: Our experts analyze your profile, define your goals, and design the most suitable study–migration pathway.
  • Comprehensive application preparation: Including translation, document checks, and ensuring compliance with the strict requirements of Australian immigration authorities.
  • Ongoing monitoring and updates: Keeping clients informed of progress, minimizing errors, and reducing processing time.

What sets LEM apart is transparency and dedication. All costs are clearly disclosed with no hidden fees, giving you complete peace of mind. With a team of highly experienced migration agents and education consultants, LEM is committed to delivering optimal, transparent, and personalized solutions for every application. Beyond visa assistance, LEM also supports you after arrival in Australia with career orientation and settlement guidance.

With the motto “Visa Expertise You Can Trust”, LEM is more than just a service provider – we are your reliable companion, empowering you to confidently embark on your journey of study and migration in Australia. Choosing LEM means choosing a brighter future, where your dreams take flight with dedication and expertise.

tieude: PTE ACADEMIC 2025: IMPORTANT CHANGES FROM AUGUST 7, 2025
tieudeseo: PTE ACADEMIC 2025: IMPORTANT CHANGES FROM AUGUST 7, 2025
mieutangan: Pearson officially launches the Enhanced PTE Academic on August 7, 2025 — an upgraded version featuring major changes in test structure, question types, and scoring methods. This is a significant step toward improving the accuracy of English proficiency assessment for both academic and skilled migration purposes.
mieutachitiet:
Pearson officially launches the Enhanced PTE Academic on August 7, 2025 — an upgraded version featuring major changes in test structure, question types, and scoring methods. This is a significant step toward improving the accuracy of English proficiency assessment for both academic and skilled migration purposes.

Image sources: PTE Marine, PTE Marine, PTE Basic, PTE UNI

Core elements remain the same:

  • PTE continues to be a trusted international English test, used by millions of test-takers, universities, and governments.
  • The test remains fully computer-based, lasting around 2 hours and divided into three main parts: Speaking & Writing, Reading, and Listening.
  • Existing preparation materials are still useful, with new resources being added.

Key updates:

  • The number of questions increases from 52 to about 65, covering 22 question types.
  • Two new question types are introduced in the Speaking section:
    1. Respond to a Situation – provide a spoken response to a hypothetical scenario, assessing real-life interaction skills.
    2. Summarise Group Discussion – listen to a group discussion and summarize it, testing summarization and coherent expression skills.
  • Some integrated tasks are now split to assess individual skills more precisely, leading to clearer scoring.

Scoring & reliability:

  • A hybrid scoring system combining AI + human examiners will be used for extended speaking and writing tasks.
    • AI evaluates grammar, pronunciation, and fluency,
    • Human examiners assess content quality.
  • An automated monitoring system will detect memorized responses and flag them for expert review.

Global recognition:

PTE 2025 remains accepted by the Australian Government for all visa types, 100% of Australian universities, and over 3,500 global institutions across Australia, New Zealand, Canada, the UK, and beyond.

If you plan to study abroad or apply for migration, start preparing early for the Enhanced PTE Academic to secure your success!
